zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期偏震荡整理，存在支撑反弹机会
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格位于2345.55美元，较24小时内高点2360.6美元略有回落，短期呈现震荡整理格局。价格徘徊于SMA(20)2337.92附近，显示短期均线支撑有效，但上方压力仍存在，行情缺乏明确突破方向。  

MACD指标显示当前主线为1.40096，尽管信号线数据缺失，但主线在零轴上方仍偏多，暗示市场多空力量相对均衡，短线多头占优可能有限。若价格跌破20日均线支撑，空头力量或逐步显现，需关注下方支撑位2336附近。  

关键阻力位在2360.6美元，高位承压明显，突破难度较大。如能有效站稳2360以上，则可能触发短线反弹至2375-2380区域。相反，若下破2336支撑，则短线有回调至2320-2315附近的风险，交易应控制仓位。  

综合来看，短线交易建议以低吸高抛为主，关注2336-2360区间震荡机会。可在接近支撑位置考虑小幅买入，遇到阻力或价格快速上行时逐步减仓，同时保持风险管理，避免追涨杀跌造成不必要损失。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading near $2345.55, showing minor downside pressure with a 24-hour decline of 0.56%. Price action suggests consolidation within a tight $2336–$2360 range, reflecting short-term indecision. The market has been hovering around the 20-day simple moving average at $2337.92, which is now acting as a dynamic support level. Any sustained move below this SMA could indicate increased bearish sentiment, whereas holding above it may reinforce the short-term bullish bias.  

The MACD reading of 1.40096 indicates moderate upward momentum, though the absence of the signal line prevents a full crossover analysis. Nevertheless, the positive MACD suggests that buyers still retain some control, albeit weak. RSI data is unavailable, but price action within the narrow channel hints that ETH is neither deeply overbought nor oversold, emphasizing a neutral to mildly bullish short-term outlook. Monitoring MACD trends in the coming sessions will be crucial for gauging potential directional shifts.  

Key support is positioned at $2336, coinciding with recent intraday lows and the 20-day SMA. On the upside, immediate resistance is near $2360, which has capped gains over the past 24 hours. A decisive break above this level could open a path toward $2380–$2400, whereas failure to hold support may target $2310–$2320. Traders should watch for volume confirmation on any breakout, as low liquidity in this range increases the risk of false moves.  

Given the current conditions, cautious trading is advisable. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight stop-losses below $2330, targeting the upper channel at $2360–$2380. Conversely, conservative traders could wait for a confirmed breakout or breakdown before initiating positions. Overall, Ethereum exhibits a range-bound pattern with a slightly bullish undertone, making selective, disciplined trades more suitable than aggressive entries at this stage.
